big_problem: Three Bureau tabs still hide behind HIDDEN_BUREAU_SLUGS while APIs return live league rows — League L5 roster archetypes are invisible in-product.
epic: League L5 — Unhide remaining Bureau tabs with screenshot-ready renderers
slice_title: Waiver Tendencies tab unhidden with transaction pattern renderer
parity_ref: League L5 — hidden Bureau renderers or watermarked export
acceptance_ref: ACCEPTANCE Gate 3 — Bureau behavioral tabs return data
acceptance_commands: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const s=fs.readFileSync('apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts','utf8'); if(!s.includes('waiver-tendencies')) process.exit(0); const m=s.match(/HIDDEN_BUREAU_SLUGS[^;]+/); if(m&&m[0].includes('waiver-tendencies')){console.error('waiver-tendencies still hidden');process.exit(1);} process.exit(0);"
